name: property managers handling 10-20 properties tool
description: For property managers handling 10-20 properties, inefficient lead capture causes missed tenant opportunities. We automate nurturing and scheduling instead of manual follow-ups and scheduling.
problem_solved: Inefficient lead capture and tenant nurturing process
